blended.narrative: Vail is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 55°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
